name: CPUUtilization
definition: Instance CPU utilization; useful but secondary to cache and memory distress for DocDB triage.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Stay at instance or role granularity

name: DatabaseConnections
definition: Client-initiated active and idle connections on an instance.
absence_means: No client traffic or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Do not group by client metadata in default dashboards

name: DatabaseConnectionsMax
definition: One-minute maximum of open connections on an instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with DatabaseConnectionsLimit

name: DatabaseConnectionsLimit
definition: Maximum allowed concurrent connections on an instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Low-cardinality and safe

name: EngineUptime
definition: Time the instance engine has been running; useful to spot restarts or failovers.
absence_means: Restart, failover, or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Do not over-split a monotonic uptime metric

name: DatabaseCursors
definition: Number of open cursors on an instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Cursors by raw client is too high-cardinality

name: DatabaseCursorsTimedOut
definition: Timed-out cursors in the one-minute period.
absence_means: No timed-out cursors or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep at instance-level

name: OpcountersQuery
definition: Queries issued in the one-minute period; idle baseline is non-zero due to internal work.
absence_means: Idle workload or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Do not over-interpret tiny non-zero baselines

name: OpcountersCommand
definition: Commands issued in the one-minute period.
absence_means: Idle workload or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Command mix detail is log/profiler work not metric work

name: OpcountersInsert
definition: Insert operations issued in the one-minute period.
absence_means: No insert activity or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep bounded to instance or role

name: OpcountersUpdate
definition: Update operations issued in the one-minute period.
absence_means: No update activity or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Useful with change streams and transactions

name: OpcountersDelete
definition: Delete operations issued in the one-minute period.
absence_means: No delete activity or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep bounded to instance or role

name: DocumentsReturned
definition: Documents returned in the one-minute period; good fan-out and read-amplification proxy.
absence_means: No reads or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Collection-level grouping should be deferred to logs

name: TransactionsOpen
definition: Open transactions on an instance.
absence_means: No open transactions or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Useful only with bounded instance grouping

name: TransactionsAborted
definition: Transactions aborted in the one-minute period.
absence_means: No aborted transactions or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Pair with profiler/audit before conclusions

name: ReadLatency
definition: Average disk read I/O latency.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Average not percentile

name: WriteLatency
definition: Average disk write I/O latency.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Average not percentile

name: ReadIOPS
definition: Average disk read I/O operations per second at the instance layer.
absence_means: Read path idle or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with cache-hit ratios and volume reads

name: WriteIOPS
definition: Average disk write I/O operations per second at the instance layer.
absence_means: Write path idle or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with write latency and replica lag

name: VolumeReadIOPs
definition: Cluster volume billed read operations aggregated over 5-minute intervals.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Cluster-level only; reported as the live VolumeReadIOPs surface with io_ps naming

name: VolumeWriteIOPs
definition: Cluster volume billed write operations aggregated over 5-minute intervals.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Cluster-level only; reported as the live VolumeWriteIOPs surface with io_ps naming

name: StorageNetworkReceiveThroughput
definition: Network bytes per second received from the cluster storage volume by each instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret as storage path, not client path

name: StorageNetworkTransmitThroughput
definition: Network bytes per second sent to the cluster storage volume by each instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret as storage path, not client path

name: NVMeStorageCacheHitRatio
definition: Percent of requests served by the tiered cache on NVMe-backed instances.
absence_means: Instance family does not support NVMe tiered cache or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Gate by instance family support

name: BufferCacheHitRatio
definition: Percent of requests served from the buffer cache.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Percentage metric; do not rate or sum across unlike scopes

name: IndexBufferCacheHitRatio
definition: Percent of index requests served from cache.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Can briefly spike above 100 percent after drops

name: FreeableMemory
definition: Available memory in bytes on the instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use instance or role only

name: FreeLocalStorage
definition: Available local temporary/log storage per instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: This is not cluster volume free space

name: SwapUsage
definition: Swap space in use on the instance.
absence_means: No swap use or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Late-stage memory distress signal

name: LowMemThrottleQueueDepth
definition: Queue depth for requests throttled by low memory.
absence_means: No throttling or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Stay at instance-level

name: LowMemNumOperationsThrottled
definition: Requests throttled due to low available memory in the one-minute period.
absence_means: No throttled operations or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Pair with FreeableMemory and cache-hit ratios

name: DBClusterReplicaLagMaximum
definition: Maximum replica lag in milliseconds across the cluster.
absence_means: No replicas, no lag, or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Cluster-level metric can hide one bad reader

name: DBInstanceReplicaLag
definition: Replica lag in milliseconds for a specific replica instance.
absence_means: Metric absent on writer-only or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Best per-reader drilldown signal

name: ChangeStreamLogSize
definition: Storage used by retained change stream log; subset of cluster storage and a cost/backlog signal.
absence_means: Change streams disabled or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Do not sum with VolumeBytesUsed

name: VolumeBytesUsed
definition: Cluster storage used in bytes.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Cluster-level cost and capacity signal

name: AvailableMVCCIds
definition: Remaining write operations before the cluster becomes read-only.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Critical runway metric; keep ungroupped or cluster-level only

name: BackupRetentionPeriodStorageUsed
definition: Backup storage used inside the retention window.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Cost signal not immediate health signal

name: TotalBackupStorageBilled
definition: Total billed backup storage for the cluster.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Cost signal not immediate health signal

name: CPUCreditBalance
definition: Remaining burst credits for T3 instances.
absence_means: Instance class not T3 or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Gate by instance family

name: DBLoad
definition: Average active sessions from Performance Insights; only published when PI is enabled and there is load.
absence_means: PI disabled or no recent load
cardinality_footguns: Do not assume presence in every deployment

name: DBLoadCPU
definition: Average active sessions whose wait type is CPU.
absence_means: PI disabled or no recent load
cardinality_footguns: Interpret only with DBLoad or DBLoadNonCPU

name: DBLoadNonCPU
definition: Average active sessions whose wait type is not CPU.
absence_means: PI disabled or no recent load
cardinality_footguns: Wait-heavy load without context can mislead

name: DiskQueueDepth
definition: Queued disk operations waiting on the storage path for a DocumentDB instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep at instance or role granularity

name: DocumentsInserted
definition: Documents inserted during the one-minute period on the instance.
absence_means: No insert activity or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep bounded to instance or role

name: DocumentsUpdated
definition: Documents updated during the one-minute period on the instance.
absence_means: No update activity or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep bounded to instance or role

name: DocumentsDeleted
definition: Documents deleted during the one-minute period on the instance.
absence_means: No delete activity or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep bounded to instance or role

name: TTLDeletedDocuments
definition: Documents deleted by the TTL monitor during the one-minute period.
absence_means: No TTL deletes or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Usually low signal until TTL cleanup surges

name: OpcountersGetmore
definition: getMore operations issued during the one-minute period as cursors continue returning results.
absence_means: No getMore activity or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Useful for cursor-heavy read patterns

name: NetworkReceiveThroughput
definition: Client network bytes per second received by the instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Prefer instance or role over raw clients

name: NetworkThroughput
definition: Total client network bytes per second in and out of the instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with directional network metrics for interpretation

name: NetworkTransmitThroughput
definition: Client network bytes per second sent by the instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Prefer instance or role over raw clients

name: ReadThroughput
definition: Bytes read from disk per second by the instance.
absence_means: Read path idle or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with ReadIOPS to interpret average request size

name: WriteThroughput
definition: Bytes written to disk per second by the instance.
absence_means: Write path idle or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with WriteIOPS and change-stream growth for context

name: EBSByteBalance
definition: Remaining EBS throughput credits for supporting instance families.
absence_means: Unsupported instance family or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep gated because not every family emits it

name: EBSIOBalance
definition: Remaining EBS I/O credits for supporting instance families.
absence_means: Unsupported instance family or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep gated because not every family emits it

name: LowMemNumOperationsTimedOut
definition: Operations that timed out under low-memory pressure during the one-minute period.
absence_means: No timed-out operations or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with throttled ops and queue depth

name: LowMemThrottleMaxQueueDepth
definition: Highest low-memory throttle queue depth observed within the minute.
absence_means: No low-memory queue spikes or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with LowMemThrottleQueueDepth rather than alone

name: LongestActiveGCRuntime
definition: Duration of the longest currently active garbage-collection process on the instance.
absence_means: No active GC runtime metric or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret alongside memory pressure and write activity

name: DatabaseCursorsLimit
definition: Maximum number of cursors allowed on an instance at a point in time.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Best used as a denominator or guardrail, not alone

name: DatabaseCursorsMax
definition: Peak open cursors seen during the one-minute period on the instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with current cursor count and getMore activity

name: TransactionsStarted
definition: Transactions started during the one-minute period on the instance.
absence_means: No transaction starts or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with commits and aborts for transaction health

name: TransactionsCommitted
definition: Transactions committed during the one-minute period on the instance.
absence_means: No committed transactions or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use with started and aborted counts

name: TransactionsOpenLimit
definition: Maximum number of concurrent open transactions allowed on the instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Best used as a denominator or guardrail, not alone

name: TransactionsOpenMax
definition: Peak open transactions seen during the one-minute period on the instance.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with current open transactions and aborts
